charter: Derive and execute the next VISION-aligned tusq.dev increment through AgentXchain after M20. Focus on reducing manual setup for the opt-in local execution-policy scaffold while preserving the local/offline/no-live-execution boundary.
acceptance_contract: PM updates planning artifacts with an M21 increment grounded in .planning/VISION.md and current M20 state
Dev implements the approved M21 CLI/runtime change without live target-product I/O
QA verifies npm test plus relevant CLI smoke paths and updates acceptance artifacts
Launch artifacts stay honest about dry-run-only behavior
